declarations.name: YangMills.RG.PhysicalGaugeCMP116ActivityTransport.of_cmp116RawSource
declarations.role: Construct the canonical dictionary-backed activity transport from a raw-source compatibility package.
declarations.caveat: Pure composition; it proves no source estimate.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.physicalGaugeCMP116SupportHypotheses_of_cmp116RawSource
declarations.role: Project the canonical raw-source transport into the Appendix-F support package.
forgets: physical distinction between support proofs after packaging
declarations.caveat: Support facts are hypotheses, not Balaban locality theorems.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.balabanCMP116_hraw_of_cmp116RawSource
declarations.role: Produce the exact Appendix-F pointwise hraw shape for the transported family.
declarations.caveat: The raw decay is still a field of the source package.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.physicalGaugeCMP116RawSourceScaleFamily
declarations.role: Package the raw-source transport as a family indexed by distance and RG scale.
declarations.caveat: Uniformity is not encoded merely by placing data under forall t k.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.singleScaleUVDecay_of_cmp116RawSource_hsharp
declarations.role: Feed the transported family to the H# endpoint and obtain the consumer-facing SingleScaleUVDecay predicate.
declarations.caveat: The physical remainder identity hR and every source estimate remain explicit.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.SingleScaleUVDecay
declarations.role: Semantic scalar per-scale UV decay consumed by mass-gap assemblies.
declarations.caveat: By itself it does not identify Rsc with a physical covariance remainder.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.lattice_mass_gap_of_singleScaleUVDecay_geometric
declarations.role: Consume SingleScaleUVDecay plus a geometric profile g_k <= C r^k and IR decay to produce a positive lattice decay rate.
declarations.caveat: This is not the faithful 4D marginal-coupling branch.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.lattice_mass_gap_of_cluster_and_marginal_coupling
declarations.role: Use the marginal recursion and summability of g^kappa0 to assemble scalar per-scale decay into lattice exponential decay.
declarations.caveat: At the inspected HEAD it does not accept SingleScaleUVDecay by a named semantic wrapper.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.lattice_mass_gap_of_cmp116RawSource_hsharp_geometric
declarations.role: Compose the verified raw-source H# producer directly with the named geometric SingleScaleUVDecay consumer.
declarations.caveat: Must retain the _geometric suffix and all analytic hypotheses.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.lattice_mass_gap_of_singleScaleUVDecay_marginal
declarations.role: Give the marginal assembly a named semantic consumer of SingleScaleUVDecay.
declarations.caveat: Should be a thin definitional adapter, not a new analytic theorem.

declarations.name: YangMills.RG.lattice_mass_gap_of_cmp116RawSource_hsharp_marginal
declarations.role: Compose the raw-source H# producer with the faithful named marginal consumer.
declarations.caveat: Still conditional on hR and the concrete source package.
